blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No audits with 'failed' status exist in the database. Cannot trigger an audit failure without modifying backend code or infrastructure. Frontend code correctly implements error handling (RunPage error state div with error details, HistoryPage failed badge CSS class, rerun button) but cannot be tested end-to-end.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Advanced Intelligence Data Context section documenting which audits have findings, data field status, and regulatory mapping code wiring details. Added Flow Validator Guidance: API Testing section.
